free_text: Multipole mixtures in the gamma-transitions of Te-128

Reactor IR-8 of the Kurchatov Atomic

Measured relative to the 743-keV line taken as 100.,
divided by 100 by compiler to have NO-DIM units.
Transitions not placed at level scheme.
Angular distribution was approximated by Legendre
